item.title: My Past
item.description: I’m a Chinese immigrant. The story here just covers my life after landing Canada after 2011 and they are mostly about job and financial status. I know many friends are better than me and I’m not intended to complain or show off. I applied for Canada immigration in 2007. Back then, China was still on the way to boom and I just want to move to Canada to pursue better life.

item.title: My Current Financial Status
item.description: As an immigrant who have been in Canada for more than 10 years, I rate my self as stablized.

item.title: Dividen Income 2022/01
item.description: This is my first post. I’m good.
